script.name: plugin.logistics.findjob
script.description: Logistics Network: Find a job to perform
script.sourceplaintext:
$a.ship = $a.shipData[0]
skip if $a.exclude $a.exclude = table alloc skip if $a.jobs $a.jobs = table alloc
$DEFINE.CYCLETIME = 3600 $DEFINE.MINRELVAL = 1000
gosub sub.OrderStations $station.array = $result
@ = wait 100 ms
$tasks = create new array, size=3, elements='factory.empty', 'factory.full', 'need.wares', null, null, null, null, null $t = 0 $tasks.size = size of array $tasks while $t < $tasks.size @ = wait 10 ms $task = $tasks[$t] inc $t =
if $task == 'factory.empty' gosub sub.TaskFactoryEmpty else if $task == 'factory.full' gosub sub.TaskFactoryFull else if $task == 'need.wares' gosub sub.TaskNeedWares end end return null
* Sort the stations lists by priority sub.OrderStations: $table = $a.networkData['stations'] $size = size of table $table $result = array alloc: size=$size $i = 0 $prio = 8 while $prio dec $prio = $key = get next key: table=$table key=null while $key $data = $table[$key] $value = $data[1] if $value == $prio $result[$i] = $key inc $i = end $key = get next key: table=$table key=$key end end endsub
sub.FindConsumer: $supplier.i = 0 $supplier.size = size of array $station.array while $supplier.i < $supplier.size $supplier = $station.array[$supplier.i] inc $supplier.i = $sector = $supplier -> get sector do if $a.exclude[$sector] continue do if $station == $supplier continue $supplier.data = $a.networkData['stations'][$supplier] $table.imports = $supplier.data[2] if $table.imports[$find.ware] $station.amt = $supplier -> get true amount of ware $find.ware in cargo bay $ware.free = $supplier -> get free amount of ware $find.ware in cargo bay if $ware.free >= $find.min @ if not [THIS] -> call script !lib.player.checkvalidroute : Destination Sector=$supplier Allow Target=[TRUE] Command Rejected Sound=[FALSE] $time = playing time $a.exclude[$sector] = $time @ = wait 10 ms else $amt = get minimum, $ware.free, $find.max, null, null, null $ret = create new array, size=6, elements=$find.ware, $station, $supplier, $amt, $a.ship, 0, null, null return $ret end end end end endsub
sub.FindSupplier: $supplier.i = 0 $supplier.size = size of array $station.array while $supplier.i < $supplier.size $supplier = $station.array[$supplier.i] inc $supplier.i = $sector = $supplier -> get sector do if $a.exclude[$sector] continue do if $station == $supplier continue
$supplier.data = $a.networkData['stations'][$supplier] $table.exports = $supplier.data[3] if $table.exports[$find.ware] $ware.min = $table.exports[$find.ware] $station.amt = $supplier -> get true amount of ware $find.ware in cargo bay do if $ware.min != -1 $station.amt = $station.amt - $ware.min if $station.amt >= $find.min $amt = get minimum, $station.amt, $find.max, null, null, null if $amt > 0 @ if not [THIS] -> call script !lib.player.checkvalidroute : Destination Sector=$supplier Allow Target=[TRUE] Command Rejected Sound=[FALSE] $time = playing time $a.exclude[$sector] = $time @ = wait 10 ms else $ret = create new array, size=6, elements=$find.ware, $supplier, $station, $amt, $a.ship, 0, null, null return $ret end end end end end endsub
sub.ProcessNeededWares: @ if not [THIS] -> call script !lib.player.checkvalidroute : Destination Sector=$station Allow Target=[TRUE] Command Rejected Sound=[FALSE] $time = playing time $a.exclude[$sector] = $time @ = wait 10 ms else if size of table $needed.wares $sorted.array = sort table keys by value: table=$needed.wares $ware.i = size of array $sorted.array while $ware.i > 0 dec $ware.i = $ware = $sorted.array[$ware.i] gosub sub.GetWareMax
if $is.selling if $ware.amt > 0 gosub sub.GetShipMin if $ship.free > $ware.min $find.ware = $ware $find.min = get maximum, $ship.min, $ware.min, null, null, null $find.max = get minimum, $ship.free, $ware.amt, null, null, null gosub sub.FindConsumer end end else $ware.needed = $ware.max - $ware.amt if $ware.needed > 0 gosub sub.GetShipMin if $ship.free > $ware.min $find.ware = $ware $find.min = get maximum, $ship.min, $ware.min, null, null, null $find.max = get minimum, $ship.free, $ware.needed, null, null, null do if $find.max >= $find.min gosub sub.FindSupplier end end end end end end endsub
sub.CanShipTransport: $can.transport = [FALSE] if $a.ship -> can transport ware $ware $tmp = $a.shipData[3] if $tmp == 'whitelist' do if $a.shipData[4][$ware] $can.transport = [TRUE] else if $tmp == 'blacklist' $can.transport = [TRUE] do if $a.shipData[4][$ware] $can.transport = [FALSE] else if $tmp == 'all' $can.transport = [TRUE] end end endsub
sub.GetShipMin: $ship.free = $a.ship -> get free amount of ware $ware in cargo bay $ship.max = $a.ship -> get max amount of ware $ware that can be stored in cargo bay $ship.percent = $a.shipData[2] $ship.min = fixed multiply and divide: $ship.max * $ship.percent / 100 endsub
sub.GetWareMax: $data = $a.networkData['stations'][$station] if $is.selling $table = $data[3] else $table = $data[2] end $ware.max = $table[$ware] $station.max = $station -> get max amount of ware $ware that can be stored in cargo bay if $is.selling if $ware.max == -1 $ware.max = $station.max else $ware.max = $station.max - $ware.max end else do if $ware.max == -1 $ware.max = $station.max end do if $ware.max <= 0 $ware.max = 1 do if $ware.max > $station.max $ware.max = $station.max
$ware.amt = $station -> get amount of ware $ware in cargo bay if $is.selling $ware.doing = $a.imports[$station][$ware] do if $ware.doing $ware.amt = $ware.amt + $ware.doing else $ware.doing = $a.exports[$station][$ware] do if $ware.doing $ware.amt = $ware.amt - $ware.doing end
$relval = get relvalue of $ware $ware.min = $DEFINE.MINRELVAL / $relval do if $ware.min < 4 $ware.min = 4 if $station -> is of class Factory $tmp = $station ->get station scale factor $tmp = $tmp * 2 do if $ware.min > ( $station.max / $tmp ) $ware.min = $station.max / $tmp end endsub
* Search for a factory that is empty and needs wares for production cycle sub.TaskFactoryEmpty: $is.selling = [FALSE] $station.i = 0 $station.size = size of array $station.array while $station.i < $station.size $station = $station.array[$station.i] inc $station.i = skip if $station -> is of class Factory continue $sector = $station -> get sector do if $a.exclude[$sector] continue
gosub sub.GetProduction
$data = $a.networkData['stations'][$station] $table = $data[2]
$needed.wares = table alloc
$ware = get next key: table=$resources key=null while $ware $amt = $resources[$ware] do if $time != $DEFINE.CYCLETIME $amt = fixed multiply and divide: $amt * $DEFINE.CYCLETIME / $time $resources[$ware] = $amt if $a.products[$ware] if $table[$ware] gosub sub.CanShipTransport if $can.transport $ware.needed = $resources[$ware] gosub sub.GetWareMax if $ware.amt < $ware.max AND $ware.amt < $ware.needed $value = fixed multiply and divide: $ware.amt * 100 / $ware.needed $value = 100 - $value $needed.wares[$ware] = $value end end end end $ware = get next key: table=$resources key=$ware end gosub sub.ProcessNeededWares end endsub
sub.TaskFactoryFull: $is.selling = [TRUE] $station.i = 0 $station.size = size of array $station.array while $station.i < $station.size $station = $station.array[$station.i] inc $station.i = skip if $station -> is of class Factory continue $sector = $station -> get sector do if $a.exclude[$sector] continue $data = $a.networkData['stations'][$station] $table = $data[3]
$needed.wares = table alloc $wares = $station -> get products skip if $wares continue $ware.i = size of array $wares while $ware.i dec $ware.i = $ware = $wares[$ware.i] if $table[$ware] gosub sub.CanShipTransport if $can.transport gosub sub.GetWareMax $value = fixed multiply and divide: $ware.amt * 100 / $ware.max gosub sub.GetProduction $ware.needed = $products[$ware] if ( $ware.max - $ware.amt ) < $ware.needed OR $value >= 90 $needed.wares[$ware] = $value end end end end gosub sub.ProcessNeededWares end endsub
sub.GetProduction: if $station -> is of class Complex Hub $array = $station ->get factories connected to complex if $array $table = convert array to table: $array, increment=[FALSE] end else $table = table alloc $table[$station] = [TRUE] end @ $array = [THIS] -> call script !lib.station.getproduction : Station Table=$table $time = $array[0] $products = $array[1] $resources = $array[2] endsub
sub.TaskNeedWares: $is.selling = [FALSE] $station.i = 0 $station.size = size of array $station.array while $station.i < $station.size $station = $station.array[$station.i] inc $station.i = $sector = $station -> get sector do if $a.exclude[$sector] continue $data = $a.networkData['stations'][$station] $table = $data[2]
$needed.wares = table alloc $wares = $station ->get primary resources table if $wares $key = get next key: table=$wares key=null while $key $ware = $key $key = get next key: table=$wares key=$key
skip if $a.products[$ware] continue skip if $table[$ware] continue gosub sub.CanShipTransport skip if $can.transport continue gosub sub.GetWareMax $ware.needed = fixed multiply and divide: $ware.amt * 100 / $ware.max $ware.needed = 100 - $ware.needed do if $ware.needed > 0 $needed.wares[$ware] = $value end end gosub sub.ProcessNeededWares end endsub
return null

comment.var: Sort the stations lists by priority

line.text: sort table keys by value: table=
that can be stored in cargo bay
that can be stored in cargo bay

comment.var: Search for a factory that is empty and needs wares for production cycle

sval.val: Logistics Network: Find a job to perform
Sort the stations lists by priority
Search for a factory that is empty and needs wares for production cycle
